add_item.add_urls_and_the_ai_will_fetch: Add URLs and the AI will fetch additional specs, pinouts, and code examples automatically.
add_item.upload_component_photos_and_le: Upload component photos and let AI fill in the details automatically.
add_item.upload_the_photos_from_ai_iden: Upload the photos from AI identification to save them with this item.
add_item.multiple_angles_better_accurac: Multiple angles = better accuracy (top, labels, packaging)
add_item.optional_used_to_enrich_ai_con: — optional, used to enrich AI context
bulk_import.drag_photos_directly_into_yo:
Drag photos directly into your browser and group them by component.
        No folder structure needed — just drop your photos and let AI do the rest.
        Best for ad-hoc imports straight from a camera roll.
bulk_import.create_a_zip_where_each_subf:
Create a ZIP where each subfolder contains photos of one component.
        Upload it here — the AI identifies each component from its photos.
        Matches the existing folder-import workflow.
bulk_import.upload_a_csv_or_tsv_file_fro:
Upload a CSV or TSV file from Excel, Google Sheets, Notion, or any inventory tool.
        Column names are auto-detected. No AI required — fastest import method.
bulk_import.three_ways_to_add_multiple_c: Three ways to add multiple components at once. Pick the one that fits your data.
bulk_import_csv.required_unrecognised_co: ✦ Required. Unrecognised columns can be manually mapped in step 2.
bulk_import_csv.csv_tsv_or_any_delimited: CSV, TSV, or any delimited text file · max 10 MB
bulk_import_csv.click_to_select_file_or_: Click to select file or drag & drop here
bulk_import_csv.name: name ✦
bulk_import_wizard.each_batch_you_drop_b: Each batch you drop becomes a new component group. Drop multiple batches for multiple components.
bulk_import_wizard.drop_photos_here_or_c: Drop photos here or click to select
bulk_import_zip.each_subfolder_in_the_zi: Each subfolder in the ZIP becomes one inventory item. The AI analyses the photos and description (if present) to identify the component — the same pipeline as the existing folder import.
bulk_import_zip.max_size_depends_on_your: Max size depends on your PHP upload_max_filesize setting
bulk_import_zip.click_to_select_zip_or_d: Click to select ZIP or drag & drop here
bulk_import_zip.upload_a_zip_of_componen: Upload a ZIP of component folders

locations.print_this_sticker_and_stick_i: Print this sticker and stick it on the container. Scanning opens the live manifest.
locations.add_a_location_when_editing_an: Add a location when editing any component to see it here.
projects.add_components_first_then_come: Add components first, then come back to discover projects.
settings.when_users_submit_a_ticket_via: When users submit a ticket via the sidebar, an email notification with the screenshot will be sent here.
settings.paste_a_direct_image_url_uploa: Paste a direct image URL. Uploading a file above takes priority over this field.
settings.key_is_stored_in_your_database: Key is stored in your database, not in code. Leave blank to keep existing key.
